meaning: n.毛伊岛(在太平洋中北部,夏威夷群岛中的第二大岛)
examples: The remarkable photograph of a 'moonbow' was taken by Wally Pacholka as he looked over the Haleakala crater on Maui Island in Hawaii.
During our last day in Maui, Adam and I visited our father in jail.
Veiled by cosmic dust, the Milky Way arches over Haleakala Crater on Maui.
Jerry Isdale at Maui Makers gets credit, too, for helping to change my mind.
They may have checked out a few Maui homes for sale then, too.
